import io
import string

type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn advance(_ c: Color) -> Color
  match c
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn label(_ c: Color) -> String
  match c
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut state = Color.Red
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut start = 0
while i <= n
  let at_end = i == n
  mut is_space = false
  if not at_end
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_space = true
      end
    when None
      is_space = false
    end
  end
  if at_end or is_space
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      if tok == "next"
        state = advance(state)
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(label(state))
